allow: Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 uv run python -m serp_experiment.run_benchmark --repeats 10 --pause 1.0 --save serp_experiment/results.json)
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 uv run python -u -m serp_experiment.run_benchmark --only searxng_local --repeats 10 --pause 0.5 --save serp_experiment/results_searxng.json)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('results:', len\(d.get\('results',[]\)\)\); print\('unresponsive:', d.get\('unresponsive_engines'\)\); engines={}; [engines.setdefault\(e,0\) or engines.update\({e:engines[e]+1}\) for r in d['results'] for e in r.get\('engines',[]\)]; print\('per_engine:', engines\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('uptime:', m['uptime_s'], 's'\); print\('pool:', m['pool']\); print\('probe total/clean_pct:', m['probe']['total'], m['probe']['clean_pct']\)")
